ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase transaction */,
  "week_of_purchase" INTEGER /* Week of the purchase represented in an integer format */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store where the purchase was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "price_ch" REAL /* Price in the CH currency */,
  "price_mm" REAL /* Price in the MM currency */,
  "disc_ch" REAL /* Discount applied in the CH currency */,
  "disc_mm" REAL /* Discount applied in the MM currency */,
  "special_ch" REAL /* Special price indicator in CH currency */,
  "special_mm" REAL /* Special price indicator in MM currency */,
  "loyal_ch" REAL /* Loyalty score in CH currency */,
  "sale_price_mm" REAL /* Sale price in MM currency */,
  "sale_price_ch" REAL /* Sale price in CH currency */,
  "price_diff" REAL /* Difference in price before and after sale */,
  "store7" TEXT /* Flag indicating store 7 */,
  "pct_disc_mm" REAL /* Percentage discount in MM currency */,
  "pct_disc_ch" REAL /* Percentage discount in CH currency */,
  "list_price_diff" REAL /* Difference in list price */,
  "store" INTEGER /* Store identifier */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase transaction */,
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program associated with the purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_loyalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the store manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage off, buy one get one free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the loyalty program applies */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer enrolled in the program */,
  "loyalty_points" REAL /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of loyalty program (e.g., points-based, tier-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional campaign */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., Buy One Get One Free) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotional campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., marketing, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_data" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
